dashboardConfig.description: Feature flag configurations; intended to just contain overrides

aiAssetCustomEndpoints.description: When true, enables custom endpoint configuration for AI assets.

automl.description: When true, enables the AutoML (Automated Machine Learning) features.

autorag.description: When true, enables the AutoRAG (Automated Retrieval-Augmented Generation) features.

deploymentWizardYAMLViewer.description: When true, enables the YAML viewer in the model deployment wizard.

disableAcceleratorProfiles.description: DEPRECATED: Accelerator Profiles are replaced by Hardware Profiles. This field will be removed in a future version.

disableAdminConnectionTypes.description: When true, hides the Connection Types administration page.

disableBYONImageStream.description: When true, hides the Notebook images (Bring Your Own Notebook) administration page.

disableClusterManager.description: When true, hides the Cluster Settings page from the dashboard navigation.

disableCustomServingRuntimes.description: When true, hides the Serving Runtimes administration page for managing custom runtimes.

disableDistributedWorkloads.description: When true, hides the Distributed Workloads pages from the dashboard navigation.

disableFeatureStore.description: When true, hides the Feature Store pages from the dashboard navigation.

disableFineTuning.description: DEPRECATED: This field is no longer used and will be removed in a future version.

disableHardwareProfiles.description: DEPRECATED: Hardware Profiles are GA and cannot be disabled via this field. This field will be removed in a future version.

disableHome.description: When true, hides the Home page from the dashboard navigation.

disableISVBadges.description: When true, hides ISV partner badges on application cards.

disableInfo.description: When true, hides the information panel for applications on the Explore page.

disableKServe.description: When true, disables KServe single-model serving platform features.

disableKServeAuth.description: When true, disables token authentication configuration for KServe deployments.

disableKServeMetrics.description: When true, hides the metrics tab for KServe model deployments.

disableKServeRaw.description: When true, disables the raw (non-serverless) deployment mode for KServe.

disableKueue.description: When true, disables Kueue workload queue management features.

disableLLMd.description: When true, disables the LLMd (Large Language Model daemon) serving features on KServe.

disableLMEval.description: When true, disables the Language Model Evaluation (LM Eval) features.

disableModelCatalog.description: When true, hides the Model Catalog page from the dashboard navigation.

disableModelMesh.description: DEPRECATED: ModelMesh has been removed. This field will be removed in a future version.

disableModelRegistry.description: When true, hides the Model Registry pages from the dashboard navigation.

disableModelRegistrySecureDB.description: When true, hides the secure database connection options in the Model Registry settings.

disableModelServing.description: When true, hides the Model Serving pages and disables model deployment features.

disableNIMModelServing.description: When true, disables NVIDIA NIM model serving features.

disablePerformanceMetrics.description: When true, hides performance metrics on model serving pages.

disablePipelines.description: When true, hides the Data Science Pipelines pages and disables pipeline features.

disableProjectScoped.description: When true, disables project-scoped navigation mode for workbenches and model serving.

disableProjectSharing.description: When true, hides the project sharing and permissions tab within Data Science Projects.

disableProjects.description: When true, hides the Data Science Projects page from the dashboard navigation.

disableServingRuntimeParams.description: When true, hides the runtime parameters configuration on KServe model deployment forms.

disableStorageClasses.description: When true, hides the Storage Classes administration page.

disableSupport.description: When true, hides the support link from the dashboard toolbar.

disableTracking.description: When true, disables usage analytics and telemetry tracking in the dashboard.

disableTrustyBiasMetrics.description: When true, hides the TrustyAI bias metrics tab on model serving pages.

disableUserManagement.description: When true, hides the User Management administration page.

enablement.description: When true, enables the ability to install and manage ISV applications from the Explore page.

externalVectorStores.description: When true, enables external vector store integration for RAG workflows.

genAiStudio.description: When true, enables the Gen AI Studio plugin for generative AI features.

guardrails.description: When true, enables guardrails configuration for model deployments.

llmGatewayField.description: When true, shows the LLM gateway configuration field on LLMd serving forms.

maasAuthPolicies.description: When true, enables authentication policy configuration for Model-as-a-Service deployments.

mcpCatalog.description: When true, enables the MCP (Model Context Protocol) Catalog page.

mlflow.description: DEPRECATED: MLflow is now always enabled when the operator component is present. This field will be removed in a future version.

modelAsService.description: When true, enables Model-as-a-Service (MaaS) features for managed model deployments.

observabilityDashboard.description: When true, enables the observability dashboard features.

projectRBAC.description: When true, enables project-level RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) settings.

promptManagement.description: When true, enables prompt management features.

toolCalling.description: When true, enables tool-calling configuration for supported models in the model catalog.

trainingJobs.description: When true, enables model training job and Ray job features.

vLLMDeploymentOnMaaS.description: When true, enables vLLM deployment options within Model-as-a-Service.

x-kubernetes-validations.message: DEPRECATED: spec.dashboardConfig.disableAcceleratorProfiles must be removed or left unchanged.
DEPRECATED: spec.dashboardConfig.disableHardwareProfiles must be removed or left unchanged.
DEPRECATED: spec.dashboardConfig.disableFineTuning must be removed or left unchanged.
DEPRECATED: spec.dashboardConfig.mlflow must be removed or left unchanged.

genAiStudioConfig.description: Configuration options for Gen AI Studio features

aiAssetCustomEndpoints.description: Configuration for AI Asset custom endpoints feature

clusterDomains.description: List of DNS domains for cluster-local services (e.g., ["cluster.local", "prod.local"]). Used to identify internal Kubernetes services vs external providers.

externalProviders.description: Allow users to configure external LLM providers (e.g., OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic)

x-kubernetes-validations.message: Can no longer modify group configurations here, see the Auth resource instead

hardwareProfileOrder.description: Ordered list of hardware profile names controlling their display order.

modelServerSizes.description: DEPRECATED: Please use Hardware Profiles instead. This field will be removed in a future version.

x-kubernetes-validations.message: This field is DEPRECATED and must either be removed or left unchanged. Please use Hardware Profiles instead.

modelServing.description: Configuration options for model serving deployments.

deploymentStrategy.description: Kubernetes deployment strategy for model servers.

isLLMdDefault.description: When true, sets LLMd as the default serving platform for new model deployments.

x-kubernetes-validations.message: Can no longer modify notebookNamespace here

notebookTolerationSettings.description: DEPRECATED: Please use Hardware Profiles to set tolerations instead. This field will be removed in a future version.

x-kubernetes-validations.message: This field is DEPRECATED and must either be removed or left unchanged. Please use Hardware Profiles to set tolerations instead.

notebookSizes.description: DEPRECATED: Please use Hardware Profiles instead. This field will be removed in a future version.

x-kubernetes-validations.message: This field is DEPRECATED and must either be removed or left unchanged. Please use Hardware Profiles instead.

templateDisablement.description: List of workbench image template names to hide from users.

templateOrder.description: Ordered list of workbench image template names controlling their display order.
